summary: Phase 2 testing completed for LeadNation. Backend: 28/28 pytest cases pass (15 Phase 1 regression + 13 new Phase 2). Frontend: All 5 new pages (Duty Calculator, Countries Index, Country Profiles, Academy, Intelligence) render correctly, all data-testids found, integration with new APIs works end-to-end. SEO infrastructure (sitemap.xml, robots.txt, page titles) verified. Nav Tools dropdown + Footer new links work. Floating WhatsApp + CTAs present on all new pages.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/country/{slug} returns JSONResponse(status_code=404) but other endpoints rely on FastAPI default error format — consider HTTPException(404) for consistency.
Sitemap.xml uses hardcoded production domain (https://leadnation.app/) — fine for prod but won't reflect preview URLs. Acceptable for SEO.

All Phase 2 data is mocked in-memory (COUNTRY_PROFILES, ACADEMY, intelligence/duty rates). For production these should be sourced from a real data store or live tariff/market APIs — currently MOCKED as expected.
server.py is 666 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting routes by domain (countries.py, duty.py, academy.py, intelligence.py) before next phase.
seed_data_creation: Created a lead 'TEST_LeadNation User' via POST /api/leads as part of regression test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 + Phase 2 all green (28/28 backend, full frontend coverage of new pages, SEO, nav, footer, WhatsApp). Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_leadnation_api.py with TestDutyCalculator, TestCountryProfiles, TestAcademy, TestIntelligence classes added. Phase 2 data is intentionally MOCKED (duty rates, country profiles, academy courses, intel data). Sitemap.xml lives in /app/frontend/public/ — uses hardcoded leadnation.app domain. /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt return 200 via the preview ingress.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All endpoints return expected payloads with correct math (e.g., IN→AE Agriculture $10,000 -> duty 2% / VAT 5% / landed cost $10,760 matches both backend response and UI render). FTA badge appears on preferential routes. Tab switching on Academy correctly swaps Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced content. Tools nav dropdown opens on hover and navigates to all 4 destinations.
